dataHeroLandingHGS.title: Human Global Solutions
dataHeroLandingHGS.subtitle: A <red>heinsohn</red> company
dataHeroLandingHGS.description: <bold>Heinsohn Human Global Solutions</bold> is the leading company in <bold>Payroll and Human Management</bold> solutions in the region, with over <bold>45 years of experience</bold> transforming how organizations manage their human talent. As part of the Heinsohn business group, we are a <bold>technology-based company</bold> that combines innovation, deep business knowledge, and regional reach to offer next-generation solutions.

titlePresenciaRegional.title: Regional presence
titlePresenciaRegional.descripcion: We operate in <bold>more than 6 countries</bold> in Latin America, providing solutions tailored to local regulations and the specific needs of each market. Our regional expansion positions us as the ideal strategic partner for companies with multinational operations.

titleLandingHGS2.title: Solutions for every type of company
titleLandingHGS2.description: We serve both <bold>PyMES</bold> and <bold>large companies</bold> with scalable and flexible solutions that adapt to the size, complexity, and sector of each organization. Whether you need to manage 10 or 50,000 employees, we have the perfect solution for you.

titleLandingHGS3.title: Trusted by thousands of customers
titleLandingHGS3.description: More than <bold>1,000 clients throughout the region</bold> trust us to manage their payroll and human talent operations. Every day, more than 500,000 employees use our services, backed by our robust and reliable technology.

titleLandingHGS4.title: Outsourcing Solutions (BPO)
titleLandingHGS4.description: In addition to our technological solutions, we offer specialized <bold>Outsourcing services</bold> so you can focus on your core business while we take care of the operation:

titleLandingHGS5.title: Contact us
titleLandingHGS5.description: today and discover how we can transform your human management with solutions that combine <bold>technology, experience, and regional reach.</bold>

titleLandingHGS6.title: Strategic alliances with technology leaders
titleLandingHGS6.description: We are <bold>certified partners</bold> of the world's leading technology providers, such as IBM, Microsoft, and other industry leaders. These alliances allow us to integrate the best market technologies into our solutions.

titleLandingHGS7.title: Our solution portfolio
titleLandingHGS7.description: Heinsohn Human Global Solutions offers a complete ecosystem of solutions to cover all your human management needs:

titleLandingHGS9.title: Begin your digital transformation in Human Resources Management
titleLandingHGS9.description: At Heinsohn Human Global Solutions, we understand that your human talent is your organization's most valuable asset. That's why we offer you our complete ecosystem of technological solutions and specialized services so you can:

dataTimeLineAlianzas.title: Next-Generation Solutions
dataTimeLineAlianzas.description: Our platforms incorporate emerging technologies such as <bold>artificial intelligence, advanced Analytics, process automation, and optimized user experience,</bold> ensuring your company has cutting-edge tools.

dataTimeLineAlianzas.title: Proven Experience
dataTimeLineAlianzas.description: With <bold>over 40 years</bold> in the payroll and human talent management business, we have accumulated deep knowledge of best practices, regulatory challenges, and the changing needs of the labor market.

dataTimeLineAlianzas.title: Private and Public Sector
dataTimeLineAlianzas.description: We serve both the <bold>private sector</bold> and the <bold>public sector</bold>, with specialized solutions for government entities, pension funds, service companies, retail, manufacturing, and more. Our solutions by <bold>business verticals</bold> ensure that each industry receives the specific functionality it needs.
